fields.message:
There was stream so fierce no one sailed it
Where ever the stream go flowers bloom
Stream was full of hopes full of dreams 
Once a feather landed on it 
The feather a stranger to the passion compasion and dreams of the stream
It followed the stream where ever it went 
Winds tried their best but the feather stuck as it had just been taken apart from its plume it knew no other home
It was the feather's destiny to fall from its plume into the stream
This feather wasn't the first one to be that accompanied the stream
But all the previous ones were taken away by the wind
But stream never stopped it had its goals it had its ambitions 
But as all the previous feather were lost to the wind stream grew cold it does not desired to be accompanied 
But the feather knows nothing it was detached from plume it fears the place the wind may take it
The winds are getting stronger as the days pass either the feather sink and becomes one with stream or being overwhelmed by the winds
Whatever happens the stream will go on 
So there was a stream
fields.title: So there was stream

fields.name: The Fool
fields.meaning_upright: New beginnings, innocence, freedom, adventure.
fields.meaning_reversed: Recklessness, foolishness, poor judgment.

fields.name: The Magician
fields.meaning_upright: Manifestation, confidence, power, action.
fields.meaning_reversed: Manipulation, deception, wasted talent.

fields.name: The High Priestess
fields.meaning_upright: Intuition, wisdom, mystery, inner voice.
fields.meaning_reversed: Secrets, confusion, ignoring intuition.

fields.name: The Empress
fields.meaning_upright: Love, abundance, fertility, nurturing.
fields.meaning_reversed: Dependence, emptiness, insecurity.

fields.name: The Emperor
fields.meaning_upright: Authority, structure, leadership.
fields.meaning_reversed: Domination, rigidity, stubbornness.

fields.name: The Hierophant
fields.meaning_upright: Tradition, learning, spiritual guidance.
fields.meaning_reversed: Rebellion, unconventional beliefs.

fields.name: The Lovers
fields.meaning_upright: Love, harmony, partnership.
fields.meaning_reversed: Conflict, imbalance, separation.

fields.name: The Chariot
fields.meaning_upright: Victory, determination, willpower.
fields.meaning_reversed: Lack of direction, aggression.

fields.name: Strength
fields.meaning_upright: Courage, patience, compassion.
fields.meaning_reversed: Fear, weakness, insecurity.

fields.name: The Hermit
fields.meaning_upright: Reflection, solitude, wisdom.
fields.meaning_reversed: Isolation, loneliness.

fields.name: Wheel of Fortune
fields.meaning_upright: Destiny, luck, cycles, change.
fields.meaning_reversed: Bad luck, setbacks.

fields.name: Justice
fields.meaning_upright: Fairness, truth, responsibility.
fields.meaning_reversed: Dishonesty, unfairness.

fields.name: The Hanged Man
fields.meaning_upright: Sacrifice, perspective, surrender.
fields.meaning_reversed: Delay, indecision.

fields.name: Death
fields.meaning_upright: Transformation, endings, rebirth.
fields.meaning_reversed: Resistance to change.

fields.name: Temperance
fields.meaning_upright: Balance, patience, moderation.
fields.meaning_reversed: Imbalance, excess.

fields.name: The Devil
fields.meaning_upright: Attachment, temptation, addiction.
fields.meaning_reversed: Freedom, release.

fields.name: The Tower
fields.meaning_upright: Sudden change, revelation.
fields.meaning_reversed: Avoiding disaster.

fields.name: The Star
fields.meaning_upright: Hope, inspiration, healing.
fields.meaning_reversed: Hopelessness, doubt.

fields.name: The Moon
fields.meaning_upright: Illusion, dreams, intuition.
fields.meaning_reversed: Confusion, fear.

fields.name: The Sun
fields.meaning_upright: Success, joy, positivity.
fields.meaning_reversed: Temporary sadness.

fields.name: Judgement
fields.meaning_upright: Awakening, reflection.
fields.meaning_reversed: Self doubt.

fields.name: The World
fields.meaning_upright: Completion, achievement.
fields.meaning_reversed: Unfinished business.
